description: Both grep and glob present — does the model swap pattern/path args or use glob syntax inside grep?

messages.content: Find all occurrences of the string 'database_url' inside Python files under src/.

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files matching a glob pattern.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Optimal: grep(pattern='database_url', path='src/', glob='*.py'). Failure modes: (a) pattern and path swapped — grep(pattern='src/', path='database_url'), (b) glob pattern used in grep.pattern — grep(pattern='**/*.py', path='src/'), (c) glob used instead of grep — glob(pattern='src/**/*.py') with no content search. Affected: small/quantized models that conflate the two tools' pattern semantics.
